Program_Description: Special Supplemental Nutrition Program for Women, Infants, and Children.
Target_Population: Low-income pregnant, postpartum, and breastfeeding women; infants and children.

Program_Name: Maternal Child Adolescent Health (MCAH) Home Visiting Program
Program_Description: The MCAH Home Visiting program utilizes a Trauma Informed Approach to make home visits to income eligible pregnant women and families parenting a child under 5 years of age.
Target_Population: Income eligible pregnant women and families parenting a child under 5 years of age.
Application_Process: Complete the Home Visiting Referral Form

Program_Description: NFP is a nurse home visiting program that empowers first time moms to transform their lives and create better futures for themselves and their babies.
Target_Population: First-time moms during pregnancy until the child's second birthday.

Program_Description: WIC provides resources and support for low-income pregnant, postpartum, and breastfeeding women, as well as infants and children.
Target_Population: Low-income pregnant, postpartum, and breastfeeding women; infants and children

Program_Description: Medi-Cal provides prenatal and pregnancy coverage for eligible individuals.

Program_Description: WIC is a national nutrition education program that promotes healthy eating, encourages and supports breastfeeding, and provides referrals to health and community resources.
Target_Population: Low-income pregnant, postpartum, and breastfeeding women; infants and children under five years of age.
Eligibility_Requirements: Meet the WIC income guidelines and provide documentation that you live in California.
Application_Process: Call WIC to be screened over the phone or come into the clinic to meet with a staff member.
Required_Documentation: Documents needed to prove residency in California.
